details.message: Customer has requested a site visit for next week. Please confirm availability.

details.notes: Site visit completed successfully on Nov 5th. Customer was impressed with the facility.

details.feedbackText: The customer found the location ideal but has concerns about the office space. They would like to discuss potential fit-out options.

details.improvementsText: Customer requires an additional 2,000 sq.ft. of office space and 3 extra power outlets in the main warehouse area. Awaiting quote for these improvements.
